description_long: This object consists of three stylized mushrooms with thick, pale beige stems and large, irregularly shaped caps in a vibrant pink color adorned with scattered white spots. The stems curve and branch out from a common base, giving the cluster a dynamic, organic appearance. The largest cap is broad and asymmetrical, while the two smaller caps are more rounded but similarly decorated with white patches. The surface of the caps appears matte and slightly textured, with a soft, almost rubbery look. No gills are visible beneath the caps, and the stems are smooth and tapering. The overall form is whimsical and eye-catching, making it suitable for decorative use in urban parks or themed environments.
description: A cluster of three pink, white-spotted mushrooms with thick, curving beige stems and matte, irregular caps. The design is stylized and visually striking.
description_view_0: Three mushrooms with curving stems and pink, spotted caps are visible, with the largest cap prominently displayed at the top.
description_view_1: Side view showing the vertical alignment of the stems and the underside of the largest cap, with the smallest cap partially hidden.
description_view_2: The cluster is seen from the opposite side, highlighting the branching stems and the rounded shapes of all three caps.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the caps in a line, with the largest and smallest caps most visible and the stems mostly obscured.
